name: Aave
description: Aave is an Open Source Protocol to create Non-Custodial Liquidity Markets to earn interest on supplying and borrowing assets with a variable or stable interest rate. The protocol is designed for easy integration into your products and services.

name: USD AI
description: USD.AI is a yield-bearing synthetic dollar protocol backed by real-world infrastructure assets

name: Pareto Credit
description: Pareto is a private credit marketplace that connects institutional lenders and borrowers, offering scalable yield opportunities and bridging institutional capital with on-chain credit markets.

name: Figure Markets Democratized Prime
description: Democratized Prime connects your cash or crypto with borrowers seeking liquidity on their collateral

name: cSigma Finance
description: cSigma is a blockchain-based protocol that connects global borrowers and lenders by standardizing and streamlining the commercial lending process, empowering credit service providers and pool managers while offering crypto-uncorrelated yield opportunities to stablecoin holders transparently and efficiently.
